title: Main menu settings and language selection
summary: Add the default player start/settings surface with New/Continue/Settings and language selection.
acceptance: Default launch includes player-facing main/start surface rather than diagnostics harness
Provides New Game, Continue, Settings and language selection affordances
Manual language selection updates visible UI and persists in the intended scope
Does not execute release/store/signing or change simulation authority
Covered by Web and desktop E2E

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Default launch now opens a localized main menu with New Game, Continue, Settings and language controls; Web and desktop E2E, typecheck, handoff validation and quality all pass.

changes_requested: Medium: compact main menu surface is not viewport-bounded or scrollable; at 800x720/1024x720 the panel starts at y=-48 and language section extends below viewport (bottom=747), and at 390x720 language buttons extend to y=842. Default desktop/diagnostics/i18n checks otherwise pass: typecheck, web-shell e2e, desktop-shell e2e, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.

Repaired compact main-menu layout by making the start panel viewport-bounded and scrollable; added focused Web compact-viewport E2E for language/settings reachability at 390x720 and 800x720; required typecheck, web-shell, desktop-shell, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and quality all pass.

verified: No blocking findings. Prior compact-menu issue is resolved: independent Web audit at 390x720 and 800x720 in en-US and zh-TW kept main-menu-panel within 16..704 vertical bounds, zero horizontal overflow, and language buttons plus Settings locale selector reachable before dismissal. Required gates passed: typecheck, web-shell e2e (6 tests), desktop-shell e2e (3 tests), validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: typecheck, web-shell e2e, desktop-shell e2e, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.

forbiddenPaths: save schema changes unless explicitly scoped by existing persistence APIs

review.summary: No blocking findings. integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: typecheck, web-shell e2e, desktop-shell e2e, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
